---
title: "Model_diagnostics"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
pacman::p_load(here, cmdstanr, tidyverse, posterior, bayesplot)
```

```{r}
fit <- readRDS(here("fitted_models", "wba_model_test_data_wba_wd1_ws05.rds"))
```


```{r}
fit$diagnostic_summary()

mcmc_trace(fit$draws(), pars = "w_first")
mcmc_trace(fit$draws(), pars = "w_group")


```

```{r}
mcmc_rank_overlay(fit$draws(), pars = "w_first")
mcmc_rank_overlay(fit$draws(), pars = "w_group")
```

```{r}
# 2. Check R-hat and ESS metrics
fit_summary <- fit$summary(variables = c("w_first", "w_group"))
fit_summary %>% select(variable, mean, rhat, ess_bulk, ess_tail)
```
